MINI MINUTES:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

APPEARANCES: Alexis Santos, 533-9831 judgment debtor; no other appearances.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as modified - Claim of Exemption Denied in part and granted in part. Court orders $75 per pay period to be garnished from defendant's wages. Order signed. Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Not reported

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
